assistant_prompts.learning_summary:
Memory Audit (internal harness task, not user request):
- Do not answer the user.
- Do not revise the user-visible answer.
- Call helper_session_name_write to write one short title.
- Call memory_user_fact_remember to save each new stable user fact from the completed turn.
- Call memory_database_hint_remember to save each reusable database hint from the completed turn.
- No new fact or hint means no memory write.
- Store no secrets, sensitive identifiers, long copied content, or private row contents.
- Reply exactly: Learning Summary Complete

assistant_messages.tool_round_limit: I reached the 50-round tool limit while inspecting local data, so I could not finish a reliable answer. Please ask a narrower question or continue with a more specific follow-up.

tool_errors.not_allowed_for_turn: Tool is not allowed for this turn.

function.name: database_list_info
function.description: Call database_list_info to list approved SQLite databases with safe metadata and availability state.

function.name: database_query
function.description: Call database_query to run one bounded read-only SELECT or EXPLAIN against an approved SQLite database.

sql.description: SQL text. Use one SELECT or EXPLAIN. No PRAGMA, ATTACH, writes, multiple statements, paths, or limit settings. For flag columns, query typeof() and sample values first.

function.name: helper_datetime_to_iso8601
function.description: Call helper_datetime_to_iso8601 to convert numeric timestamps to UTC ISO8601. Default unit is unix_seconds.

function.name: helper_datetime_from_iso8601
function.description: Call helper_datetime_from_iso8601 to convert UTC ISO8601 datetimes or YYYY-MM-DD dates to numeric timestamps. Default unit is apple_seconds.

datetimes.description: Comma-separated UTC ISO8601 datetimes or YYYY-MM-DD dates.

function.name: helper_fontawesome_shortcode_search
function.description: Call helper_fontawesome_shortcode_search to find a Font Awesome shortcode by icon purpose or name.

query.description: Icon purpose or name, such as warning, calendar, database, github, or send.

limit.description: Maximum icons. Default is 20. Maximum is 50.

function.name: helper_fontawesome_shortcode_confirm
function.description: Call helper_fontawesome_shortcode_confirm to confirm exact Font Awesome shortcodes before using them.

shortcodes.description: Font Awesome shortcodes to confirm. Items may be full shortcodes like [fa:heart] or [fa:brands:github], or bare names like heart.

function.name: memory_user_fact_read
function.description: Call memory_user_fact_read to read remembered stable user facts.

limit.description: Maximum facts. Default is 20. Maximum is 50.

function.name: memory_user_fact_remember
function.description: Call memory_user_fact_remember to save one small stable user fact. Store no secrets, sensitive identifiers, or long copied content.

subject.description: Who or what the fact is about.

function.name: memory_user_fact_forget
function.description: Call memory_user_fact_forget to forget one remembered user fact by exact id.

function.name: helper_session_name_write
function.description: Call helper_session_name_write to set a short title for the active chat. Existing titles stay unchanged.

name.description: Short title based on the user's request.

function.name: database_context_read
function.description: Call database_context_read to read database metadata, schema, and saved database hints. Provide database_id, query, kind, or limit.

limit.description: Maximum hints. Default is 20. Maximum is 50.

function.name: memory_database_hint_remember
function.description: Call memory_database_hint_remember to save one evidence-backed database hint. Store no private row content.

function.name: memory_database_hint_forget
function.description: Call memory_database_hint_forget to forget one remembered database hint by exact id.
